creator: george@m5p.com
text: I'm still having this problem, though I can reduce its frequency by booting in single-user mode, kldloading amdgpu, waiting five or ten seconds, and then going to multi-user mode with control-D.  I've updated the title to emphasize that the bug happens only when amdgpu.ko (from graphics/drm-510-kmod version 5.10.113_8) and ZFS are both in use.  Also, it happens during booting, or else never.
